title: Russia reports toxic rain, orders locals to stay home after Ukrainian oil strike
summary_full: Russia was struggling to extinguish a fire raging at a Black Sea oil terminal hit by Ukraine earlier this week, local authorities told AFP on Thursday, after urging residents to stay home amid harmful toxic emissions. Kyiv struck oil facilities in the southern town of Tuapse on Monday, triggering a huge blaze and sending plumes […]
